gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف وآخره مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/145)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف وآخره مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/145)
text: إِنَّ نَبِيّاً مِنَ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ شَكَا إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ الضَّعْفَ وَ قِلَّةَ الْجِمَاعِ فَأَمَرَهُ بِأَكْلِ الْهَرِيسَةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Dahqan, from Dorost Bin Abu Mansour,

(It has been narrated) from Abdullah Bin Sinan, from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘A Prophetas from the Prophetsas complained to Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic of the weakness and the infrequent copulation, so Heazwj Commanded himas with the eating of Al-Hareys’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Khalid from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Dihqan from Durust ibn abu Mansur from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A Prophet of the Prophets of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, complained against deficiency in going to bed with one’s wife and he was commanded to eat al-Harisah (mashed grains and meat).’”
